wacky-cake.name: Wacky Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Sift flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt together in an 8x8-inch ungreased cake pan. Make 3 depressions in flour mixture; pour oil into one well, vinegar into second, and vanilla into third well. Pour water over all, then stir with a fork until well blended.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 30 to 40 minutes.

wafer-argiro.name: Wafer
instructions: Open 10 stuffed biscuits and remove the cream.
We break the rest of the stuffed cookies.
Heat the butter to melt over medium heat.
Add the powder and mix.
Add the cocoa and vanilla.
Let it cool for a while.
Add the cream from the cookies and mix.
Then add the walnuts and broken cookies. and mix well.
Place parchment paper on a square baking pan.
Spread the mixture and press it well to make the surface smooth and has the same thickness everywhere.
Cut it in the shape of a wafers.
Refrigerate for about 4-5 hours and ready.

walnut-coffee-cake-lezzet.name: Walnut Coffee Cake
instructions: 1. Cook the egg and powder sugar into the mixing container and with the mixer until sugar melt.
2. Add milk and butter and cook again.
3. Add flour, Turkish coffee, cocoa and baking powder and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Bake 30-35 minutes in the oven preheated in advance by taking the oiled square oven container.
5. For cream; take milk, rice flour, starch, vanilla and powder sugar to the pot.
6. Cook until you get a dense consistency by constantly mixing with a spoon.
7. For caramel sauce; Take a small pan sugar and water.
8. Cook the sugar and caramel consistency until the area.
9. Take the prepared cream with the help of spatula on the cake.
10. Place all walnuts on it.
11. 11. slice and serve by walking the caramel sauce.

walnut-kisses-recipe-comedera.name: Walnut Kisses Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 taza de nuez pelada y finamente molida
1/2 taza de harina de trigo todo uso
2 cdas de mantequilla sin sal, a temperatura ambiente
1 cda de leche entera o vegetal
1/2 cdita de esencia de vainilla natural
Ralladura fina de naranja o mandarina (opcional, pero recomendada)
1 cda extra de nuez molida para rebozar

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 been 3 and prepares a plate with baking paper.
In a bowl, mix butter with brown sugar and get a soft and homogenous cream.
Incorpora el huevo y bate hasta que se integre por completo.
Add the vanilla, milk and citrus grates. Gently mix.
En otro recipiente, combina la harina, la sal y la nuez molida.
It incorporates the dry ingredients into the moist little by little to form a soft, slightly moist but manageable mass.
It forms small balls with the size of a nut and puts them on a plate, leaving space between them.
Hornea for 12 to 15 minutes, till the base's firm and the surface's barely golden.
Retira del horno y deja reposar 10 minutos.
Rewind slightly with glass sugar mixed with ground nut while still warm.

walnut-meatballs-lezzet.name: Walnut Meatballs
instructions: 1. Mix all the ingredients that are excluded in a deep container.
2. Oil the tray.
3. Spread half of the material into the tray.
4. Spread over the entire walnut.
5. Transfer and publish on the material with the remaining meat.
6. Preheated 200 degree cook until fried in the oven.
7. Serve hot.

warm-7-layer-skillet-dip.name: Warm 7-layer Skillet Dip

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
. adobo from a can of chipotle chiles in adobo
Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: coarsely grated or torn if using singles (about 1 cup)

ingredients.item: . monterey jack or pepper jack cheese

instructions: Melt 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, in a medium deep skillet over medium heat. Cook 1 large onion, finely chopped, stirring often, until tender and translucent, 8–12 minutes. Increase heat to medium-high and continue to cook, stirring often, until onion is pale golden brown, 5–8 minutes more.

Reduce heat to medium and add 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and 1½ tsp. ground cumin to skillet. Cook, stirring, until garlic is fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 3 canned chipotle chiles in adobo, finely chopped, two 15-oz. cans pinto beans, rinsed, and 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Pour in 1 cup water and bring to a simmer, mashing beans with a potato masher (or a fork and some elbow grease) until mostly smooth. Cook, stirring often, until most of liquid is absorbed, about 2 minutes. (Beans should be risotto-like in consistency, loose enough to fall off a spoon.) Remove from heat and stir in 1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar. Cover and keep warm.
Do ahead: Beans can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat over medium-low, thinning with water and seasoning with salt as needed.

Whisk 2 tsp. adobo from a can of chipotle chiles in adobo, ½ tsp. ground cumin, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt, and ½ cup water in a small saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat. Add 4 oz. yellow American cheese, coarsely grated or torn if using singles (about 1 cup), and cook, whisking vigorously, just until cheese is melted and mixture is smooth, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and add 3 oz. Monterey Jack or pepper Jack cheese, coarsely grated (about ¾ cup); whisk until cheese is melted and queso is smooth (return to low heat briefly if needed).
Using your hands to avoid bruising, toss 2 ripe avocados, cut into ¼" pieces, with 1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice and a large pinch of salt in a medium bowl.

Uncover beans and pour queso over. Top with ¼ cup sour cream, followed by ½ cup good-quality salsa, avocados, and ¼ cup sliced pickled jalapeños. Scatter 4 scallions, green parts only, thinly sliced, and ¼ cup (packed) coarsely chopped cilantro over.
Serve dip warm in skillet with tortilla chips and lime wedges.

warm-caprese-zoodles.name: Warm Caprese Zoodles

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add cherry tomatoes and quickly stir until tomatoes just begin to soften, 1 to 2 minutes. Add zucchini noodles, salt, and pepper. Keep cooking, stirring frequently, until zoodles are tender yet firm to the bite, 2 to 3 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in mozzarella and basil. Toss to coat. Divide zoodles between 4 bowls and drizzle with balsamic glaze. Serve immediately.

warm-escarole-salad-with-goat-cheese-har.name: Warm Escarole Salad With Goat Cheese, Hard-boiled Eggs, And Bacon

ingredients.prep: torn into large bite-size pieces (about 8 cups)

instructions: Divide escarole among 6 plates. Cook bacon in medium nonstick skillet over medium heat until crisp. Transfer to paper towels to drain; reserve skillet with bacon drippings. Finely chop bacon; set aside.

Whisk olive oil and vinegar in small bowl to blend. Heat bacon drippings in skillet over medium heat. Add shallots; sauté until slightly softened, about 3 minutes. Add olive oil mixture and whisk just until heated through, about 1 minute. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Drizzle vinaigrette over escarole. Sprinkle with eggs, goat cheese, and bacon.

warm-pita-sandwich-and-leftovers-argiro.name: Warm Pita Sandwich And Leftovers
warm-pita-sandwich-and-leftovers-argiro.original_name: Ζεστό σάντουιτς µε αραβική πίτα και ό,τι περίσσεψε

ingredients.item: 1 cup of minced meat or meat or chicken cooked
1/2 cup of graviera or other melting cheese
1 cup of minced meat or meat or chicken cooked
1/2 cup of graviera or other melting cheese

instructions: We start the Arab pie sandwiches,
We spread the Arab pies on a sheet metal and hand them the minced meat, spreading it everywhere. If meat is left cooked or chicken, chop it and equalize in the same way.
Then sprinkle with the grated cheese and finely chopped pepper.
Bake the pies in the oven for 10 minutes at 200° C in resistance, just warm up and start the cheese melting.
After removing them from the oven, roll them quickly and let them stand down.
With a knife cut in half diagonally and enjoy them warm.

warmed-spiced-olives.name: Warmed Spiced Olives
instructions: Toast fennel seeds in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 3 minutes. Add lemon zest, bay leaves, olives, oil, and Aleppo pepper and cook, stirring, until just warmed through, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a serving bowl and serve warm.

wasabi-salmon-with-bok-choy-green-cabbag.name: Wasabi Salmon With Bok Choy, Green Cabbage, And Shiitakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Heat a large rimmed baking sheet for 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, mix mayonnaise and wasabi in a small bowl. Stir in half of ginger and half of garlic; set aside. Season fish all over with salt and pepper. Place bok choy, cabbage, and mushrooms in a large bowl. Drizzle with oil and add remaining ginger and garlic. Toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.

Scatter vegetables across one side of baking sheet. Arrange salmon on other side. Roast, stirring vegetables occasionally, until salmon is cooked through, 12–15 minutes. Divide vegetables among plates; top with salmon. Serve wasabi mayonnaise alongside.

watermelon-limeade.name: Watermelon Limeade
instructions: Purée watermelon, lime juice, and 2 Tbsp. agave syrup in a blender until smooth. Add 1 Tbsp. more agave, if desired. Strain into a large pitcher filled with ice and stir in 1/2 cup water. Serve over ice and garnish with lime wedges.

whipped-pumpkin-spice-coffee.name: Whipped Pumpkin Spice Coffee
instructions: Whip hot water, sugar, instant coffee, and pumpkin pie spice together with a mixer or by hand until mixture is light and has thick to soft peaks.
Mix milk, pumpkin puree, maple syrup, and vanilla together in a separate bowl until well combined.
Pour milk mixture into a serving glass and spoon coffee mixture on top. If desired, mix them together for that wonderful pumpkin pie flavor.

white-chocolate-almond-cookies.name: White Chocolate Almond Cookies

ingredients.prep: slivered - lightly toasted, and roughly chopped
white chocolate chunks, or white baking chips

instructions: Place butter in a heatproof bowl and melt in the microwave on the lowest heat setting in 10-second increments until completely melted; set aside to cool completely.
In another bowl, add the flour, baking soda, cornstarch (corn flour), and salt, and mix until well combined; set aside.

Once the butter has cooled down, add the brown sugar, granulated sugar, vanilla extract, and almond extract; whisk until the mixture has thickened, about 1-2 minutes. Next add the egg and mix until smooth and homogenous.
Add the flour mixture to the butter mixture and mix until well combined and a dough forms; add the chopped almonds and the white chocolate chips and mix until thoroughly distributed.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap, or foil and place in the fridge for AT LEAST 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 350℉ (175 C), and line two cookie sheets with parchment paper, or silicone place mats.
Portion the dough into 2 tablespoons/1 oz. balls and place on a lined baking sheet.

Bake cookies for 10-12 minutes, rotating cookie sheet halfway through baking time to ensure even browning. Let the cookies sit on the tray for minutes, then transfer to a cooling rack, store in an airtight container

whole-grilled-salmon-with-chanterelles.name: Whole Grilled Salmon With Chanterelles

ingredients.item: Chanterelle mushrooms or other wild mushrooms

ingredients.prep: preferably sockeye or coho, cleaned, scales removed

instructions: Heat a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Add butter and oil and swirl pan until butter is melted. Add mushrooms, thyme, and garlic and season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing often, until mushrooms are golden brown and tender, 5–8 minutes; set aside.

Prepare a grill for medium-low heat. Using a sharp knife, make a slit along belly of salmon, running from rib cage to tail. Turn salmon on its back and cut along both sides of backbone without piercing through skin on other side. Carefully remove backbone without tearing skin, then remove pin bones with small needle-nose pliers or tweezers. Season inside of fish with salt and pepper and stuff lemon slices, dill, thyme, and tarragon inside cavity. Tie wet kitchen twine around fish in several places to secure. Place on a rimmed baking sheet; rub skin all over with oil.

Carefully place fish on grill grates and grill, uncovered, until flesh on bottom side is mostly opaque but still slightly translucent in the center, 12–18 minutes. Carefully turn fish and cook on the other side to the same doneness, 8–10 minutes. Transfer fish to a clean rimmed baking sheet and let rest at least 10 minutes.

Place skillet with chanterelles directly on edge of grill to reheat while you portion the fish. Remove strings and peel back skin from salmon; discard. Break flesh of top fillet into large pieces and transfer to a platter. Discard aromatics and remove skin from bottom fillet, break up, and transfer to platter. Season with more salt and pepper and spoon warm chanterelles over.

whole30-balsamic-vinaigrette.name: Whole30 Balsamic Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine olive oil, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper in a Mason jar or container with a tight-fitting lid; cover tightly with the lid and shake vigorously until thickened, about 2 minutes. Taste dressing and adjust flavor with salt and pepper.

wild-rice-salad-recipe-with-feta-cheese-.name: Wild Rice Salad Recipe With Feta Cheese
wild-rice-salad-recipe-with-feta-cheese-.original_name: Receta de ensalada de arroz salvaje con queso feta

ingredients.item: 1 / 2 cup of red pepper (cut into small cubes)
1/2 taza de cebolla morada (cortada en tiras)

instructions: Wash the rice with cold water to remove any impurity.
Calienta el caldo de verduras en una olla con la sal marina y, cuando hierva, incorpora el arroz.
Mezcla y deja cocer a fuego medio - bajo por 40 minutos o hasta que los granos abran ligeramente y queden tiernos.
Una vez listos, retira de la olla y deja enfriar.
When the rice's cold, add to a bowl and add spinach, peppers, celery and onion.
Incorpora las almendras fileteadas y el queso feta.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, honey, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, balsamic vinegar, salt and pepper to taste.
Agrega la vinagreta al bol y mezcla todo muy bien hasta que quede bien integrado.
Reticify and enjoy salt.

wild-semifreddo-teleculinaria.name: Wild Semifreddo
instructions: Put the Jell-O leaves down in cold water. In a pot, pour the frozen red fruit, sugar and lemon juice and light it to the fire until it is made of sweet consistency, stirring from time to time.
Remove the sweet from the fire, crush, coe and save some for decoration. Add to the remaining mashed gelatin leaves and stir until they are completely melted. Let it cool down.

Beat the cream in very firm whipped cream and wrap with the previous preparation. At the bottom of a shape (20 cm in diameter) of removable background, place half of the sticks, broken into small pieces. Cover with half of the previous preparation.

Lay out the remaining sticks in pieces and cover with the remaining cream. Finish by placing the fruit puree you have reserved and, with a toothpick, stir to create the marble effect. Take it to the freezer until it's very firm. Before serving, deform and decorate with fresh red fruits and fresh basil leaves.

williamsburg-orange-cake.name: Williamsburg Orange Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13 inch pan, two 9-inch round cake pans, or three 8-inch round cake pans.

In a large bowl, combine cake flour, sugar, baking soda and salt. Mix in butter, shortening, buttermilk, eggs, raisins, nuts, orange zest and vanilla. Beat with an electric mixer for 3 minutes on high speed. Pour batter into prepared pan.

Bake in preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in center of cake comes out clean. Bake 9x13 inch pan 45 to 50 minutes, or layers 30 to 35 minutes. Allow to cool, and frost with Williamsburg Butter Frosting.

winters-truce.name: Winter’s Truce

ingredients.item: 0.5 unaged grappa (such as nardini) or other white spirit

instructions: Bring ginger, honey, and 6 oz. water to a simmer in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve honey; remove from heat and let steep 5 minutes. Combine Chartreuse, grappa, lemon juice, echinacea extract, and bitters in a warm mug; strain ginger infusion into mug. Garnish with cinnamon stick.

wrapped-chard-recipe-lezzet.name: Wrapped Chard Recipe

ingredients.item: Can be used in black cabbage, spinach or vineberry leaf.
The leaves of the body are small if a few leaflets can make the winding easier.
A more satisfying version of interior you can add fine fits or pumpkin.
You can mix boiled chickpeas or lentils if you want to add Vegetarian but protein.

instructions: 1. thoroughly wash and cut the stems.
2. Big leaves rewind.
3. Interior preparation for harper, heat the olive oil in a pan and roast the fine lies onions.
4. Add Salçand add a few add rice after min roasting.
5. Add and mix salt, pepper and fine chopped yeast.
6. Finally, pour half glass water and tribute from the space.
7. Each cotton leaf d&uuml cool on a floor.
8. by default, and wrap the leaf combo.
9. Directory of wraps in the pot, u walk the juice and olive oil.
10. Add water to the dust and the water until it is light.
11. 11. In the middle fire, cook about 30–35 minutes off the cover.
12. Service at room temperature.
